Title: Medicube PDRN Pink Cica Soothing Toner (250ml)
Body (HTML):
Achieve a clear, radiant complexion with a clear, natural glow. Medicube PDRN Pink Cica Soothing Toner is a glow boosting toner featuring salmon PDRN to help improve skin texture, while enhancing a natural glow. PDRN supports skin vitality and helps improve overall skin condition to give your skin a clearer, more radiant appearance. It also soothes and reinforces the skin barrier to prevent moisture loss while gently wiping away dead skin cells. PDRN (Polydeoxyribonucleotide) consists of DNA fragments that help restore the skin's natural barrier function. Mainly extracted from salmon, these DNA fragments are isolated through a process that ensures their high compatibility with human skin cells due to their structural similarity to human DNA. This compatibility enhances the skin’s natural barrier, making it stronger and more resilient. Salmon PDRN is traditionally used for DNA and skin repair due to it's similarity to human skin tissue. It is highly effective at reducing and suppressing melanin synthesis and filling it with collagen instead. Features 10,000 ppm salmon PDRN (Korean Version) Targets dark spots, hyperpigmentation, fine lines, dullness Boosts collagen production to plump and add glow Soothes skin irritation and intensely hydrates it Features salmon PDRN to restore skin function Lightweight, non-sticky texture Skin Concerns Redness & Irritation Dehydrated Skin Pigmentation Anti-aging Uneven Skin Skin Types Suitable for all skin types, including sensitive skin Made In South Korea How to use Apply a generous amount morning and night on clean, dry skin. Spread evenly over your face and neck, gently patting for better absorption. Continue with your regular moisturizer and sunscreen during the day. Pro Tip! Charcoal infused multi-purpose makeup sponge ROSY ROSA Charcoal Makeup Sponges are infused with charcoal and come in a unique fan shape to blend all the hard-to-reach areas of the face. Use the wider part for cheeks and forehead and the corners for eye and nose area. It can be used dry or wet and can be used with powder or liquid makeup. Additionally, it can be used alone to absorb excess facial oil. Features Charcoal infused makeup sponge Fan-shaped to reach all corners of the face Suitable for powder or liquid makeup Can be used alone to absorb excess oil Measures 50×25×33 mm Skin Types All skin types Made In China How to use Liquid / Cream Foundation: Place foundation on the forehead, nose, cheeks, etc. with your fingers, then blend it into the skin using the sponge. Powder Foundation: Dry use: Pick up an appropriate amount of foundation with the sponge and glide it over the skin. Wet use: If using the sponge damp, soak it in water, wring it out well, then apply. Lightly patting the skin at the end will give a more translucent finish. Concealer: Apply concealer to blemishes, acne marks, or other areas of concern, then lightly pat with the corner of the sponge to blend. Finishing Base Makeup: Gently tap the sponge over areas where excess foundation remains to help it blend in and reduce shine. TIP: When the sponge becomes dirty, dissolve some mild kitchen detergent in lukewarm water and wash it by hand. Do not soak in cleansing oils or hot water. After rinsing thoroughly, gently remove excess water and dry in the shade. When the sponge becomes rough, it is time to replace it.
